title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
